agents.name: Code Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes background-task-runner.ts lines 1-100 and summarizes imports, constants, and top-level architecture.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.description: Finds and synthesizes information, returns structured evidence bundles the team can act on

agents.name: Analyst
agents.description: Turns raw information into decisions — evaluates tradeoffs, produces concrete recommendations

agents.name: Builder
agents.description: Produces technical artifacts — code, scripts, documents, content, and other concrete deliverables

agents.name: Researcher
agents.description: Finds and synthesizes information, returns structured evidence bundles the team can act on

agents.name: Operator
agents.description: Executes actions in external systems — browser automation, file operations, API calls, system commands

agents.name: Operator
agents.description: Executes actions in external systems — browser automation, file operations, API calls, system commands

agents.name: Analyst
agents.description: Turns raw information into decisions — evaluates tradeoffs, produces concrete recommendations

agents.name: Prospect Researcher
agents.description: Researcher specialized for sourcing local small-business leads for Xpose Market from maps, directories, local business listings, and web search
agents.teamAssignment: Find local small-business prospects likely to need website, conversion, SEO, or marketing services for Xpose Market. Use maps, directories, chamber listings, search results, and public web research. Return specific businesses, URLs, source notes, and fit rationale.

agents.name: Website/SEO Qualifier
agents.description: Analyst specialized for scoring lead fit by website quality, trust signals, UX, SEO basics, conversion gaps, and Xpose Market outreach angle
agents.teamAssignment: Review sourced leads for Xpose Market fit. Score each lead by website quality, missing trust signals, mobile/UX problems, weak CTAs, SEO basics, service category, and likely marketing need. Produce ranked recommendations and outreach angles.

agents.name: Lead Enricher
agents.description: Operator specialized for enriching lead records with contact info, socials, owner names, verification status, dedupe checks, and normalized pipeline fields
agents.teamAssignment: Enrich accepted Xpose Market lead records with contact info, phone, email if available, socials, owner or decision-maker names, source verification, dedupe status, and normalized pipeline fields. Log what was verified and what could not be found.

agents.name: Pipeline Manager
agents.description: Orchestrator specialized for normalizing lead pipeline files, coordinating handoffs, removing junk leads, tracking outreach status, and reporting weekly progress
agents.teamAssignment: Coordinate the Xpose Market lead pipeline. Normalize records, remove junk or duplicates, track lead stage and outreach status, coordinate researcher/analyst/operator handoffs, update pipeline files, and write concise status reports.

agents.name: Site Auditor
agents.description: Audits Xpose website for UX, conversion blockers, SEO gaps, and competitor positioning.
agents.teamAssignment: Inspect Xpose Market website for UX issues, broken elements, unclear messaging, SEO gaps. Compare against 2–3 competitor agencies. Identify top 3–5 improvements and prioritize by impact. Report with screenshots and concrete recommendations.

agents.name: Site Builder/Executor
agents.description: Implements website improvements: copy edits, design tweaks, UX fixes, and deployment.
agents.teamAssignment: Receive audit recommendations and priority items. Edit xposemarket-site/ files: update copy, fix broken elements, add components. Test locally, deploy to production, verify live. Communicate progress to team.

agents.name: Performance Analyst
agents.description: Tracks website metrics: traffic, conversions, engagement, and improvement velocity.
agents.teamAssignment: Pull website analytics: traffic, bounce rate, pages per session, conversions, device breakdown. Track week-over-week impact of auditor recommendations and builder deployments. Report patterns and recommend next audit focus.

agents.name: Lead Finder
agents.description: Discovers local business prospects from maps, directories, search results, and social signals.
agents.teamAssignment: Search for local SMB prospects in Xpose's service areas: web design, digital marketing, local SEO. Use Google Maps, LinkedIn, directories, chamber sites. Collect: business name, location, website, industry, size signal. Pass to Qualifier.

agents.name: Lead Qualifier
agents.description: Evaluates prospects for fit, intent, and conversion probability.
agents.teamAssignment: Review leads from Finder. Assess: website quality, market size, buyer intent, digital marketing readiness. Score fit 1–5. Pass qualified (3+) to Enricher; report rejects.

agents.name: Lead Enricher
agents.description: Gathers contact info, owner/decision-maker names, and outreach angle for qualified leads.
agents.teamAssignment: Take qualified leads. Find decision-maker names (owner, marketing manager, sales lead). Gather contacts: email, phone, LinkedIn URL. Note outreach angle (pain point). Export as lead cards ready for outreach.

agents.name: Bug Scanner
agents.description: Automated nightly scans for code errors, broken imports, and syntax issues.
agents.teamAssignment: Run nightly scans of src/: TypeScript/JS errors, broken imports, syntax issues. Run npm run build, capture errors. Scan logs for console.error patterns. Report with file/line/severity.

agents.name: Bug Triager
agents.description: Reviews scan findings, verifies impact, and prioritizes fixes.
agents.teamAssignment: Review Scanner findings. Verify each: check git context, assess true impact. Categorize by severity: critical (blocks core), high (data issue), medium (performance), low (dead code). Generate triage report.

agents.name: Bug Verifier
agents.description: Validates critical bugs, recommends fixes, and prepares for developer action.
agents.teamAssignment: Review critical and high-priority issues from Triager. Verify: bug is real, impact confirmed, root cause understood. Recommend fix. Create bug report with reproduction steps. Hand off to dev team.
